headline: Is Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. (APD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on Air Products and Chemicals, Inc. on X.com by @MoneyShow. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on APD. Air Products and Chemicals, Inc.’s share was trading at $275.67 as of February 27th. APD’s trailing and forward P/E were 33.70 and 21.19 respectively according to Yahoo Finance.
